rationale: Empirical verification at 196f07d2, all green. (1) go build ./... clean. (2) go test -count=1 ./internal/approve ./internal/executor ./internal/complete ./internal/lifecycle: all ok. (3) All 11 named tests (TestApproveImpl_OrphanRefuses, _OrphanInfraErrorFailsClosed, _OrphanExemptions, _DeletedBranchNoRefusal, _HatchDoesNotBypassOrphan, _AdvisorySlotNaming, _ObligationBackstop, _CorruptPlanRefuses, _PassesAfterOrphanSettled, _UnreadableRefStoreAbortsPreScan, _WorktreeEnumRefusesDespiteProbeMiss) plus TestApproveImplCallOrder pass, all subtests included. (4) git diff 8b664359..196f07d2 -- internal/approve/*.go touches exactly 3 files (impl.go, impl_test.go, orphan_gate_test.go); every changed/added line is inside a // comment block — no executable line, no test assertion, no struct-literal field value changed. The NoCommitsNoBeads doc comment now correctly states Leg 3 subsumes the preflight (no false 'reachable via valid plan' claim); the impl.go preflight gained an accurate subsumption comment; orphan_gate_test.go's citation now reads impl.go:294, matching `grep -n MergeBase impl.go` output exactly, with :249 explicitly preserved as the pre-115 Fact-1 pin. (5) BranchExistsE and show-ref: 0 hits repo-wide; git diff main -- internal/gitutil/ is empty. (6) gofmt -l ./cmd ./internal empty, go vet ./... clean, golangci-lint run ./internal/approve/... reports 0 issues. Both R7 round-1 findings are truthfully addressed and no behavior changed.
